title: 3 Idiots
overview: Two friends search for their long lost companion and in the process they recount their college days and the memorable events that shaped their lives.

title: Dangal
overview: Biographical sports drama on former wrestler Mahavir Singh Phogat and his two wrestler daughters' struggle towards glory at the Commonwealth Games in the face of societal oppression.

title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
overview: An Indian man with a magnanimous heart takes a young mute Pakistani girl back to her homeland to reunite her with her family.

title: Sultan
overview: A story of a common man Sultan Ali Khan who grows up in a place where wrestling is a way of life and he becomes a wrestling champion.

title: PK
overview: An alien on Earth loses the remote control of his spaceship and a girl helps him to find it.

title: Bharat
overview: The story of a man who stands up against injustice and fights for the rights of the poor and oppressed.

title: Raazi
overview: A Kashmiri woman agrees to marry a Pakistani army officer in order to spy on Pakistan during the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971.

title: Andhadhun
overview: A series of mysterious events change the life of a blind pianist who has been able to see the women of his life for only a few minutes.

title: Badhaai Ho
overview: A man is left to take care of his family's baby when his wife delivers a child.

title: The Zoya Factor
overview: A young cricketer is approached by a girl who claims to be his biggest fan and offers to help him with his game.
